non_blocking_issues: Streaming branch hard 280.dp cap uses only ~280dp on very tall screens during streaming — documented as intentional UX choice (L182-183). No change needed.
Out-of-scope: other heightIn(max=...) sites (ChatInputBar.kt:351, ModelManagementSection.kt:159, ChatTopBar.kt x3) not exhaustively parent-traced, but all marked bounded in prior audit.
notes: APPROVE on all three fixes. Verified Fix 1 matches ChatServerManagementDialog byte-for-byte. Fix 2 strictly safer: both ReasoningCard call sites (ChatMessageContent.kt:400 isStreaming=true, ChatMessageRow.kt:313 isStreaming=false) never share a composable instance — transition is unmount/remount, not in-place modifier swap. Fix 3 parent claim verified (SettingsScreen.kt:109-114 is verticalScroll). No new unbounded-measurement risk.
